name: open-ai
description: OpenAI -- list models and send responses

src/suite.ts.methods: openAi(config: OpenAiConfig): this { this.openAiConfig = config; return this; }

src/types/suite.ts.type-imports: import type { OpenAiConfig, OpenAiListModels, OpenAiResponse } from "./open-ai.js";
src/types/suite.ts.service-types: openAi: { listModels(bearerToken: string): Promise<OpenAiListModels>; response(bearerToken: string, model: string, format: string, message: string): Promise<OpenAiResponse>; };
